Package neqsim.process.equipment.expander

package neqsim.process.equipment.expander
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.equipment
     
  • Class
    Description
    Expander
    Expander class.
    ExpanderChartKhader
    ExpanderChartKhader is a composition-aware, two-dimensional radial-inflow expander performance map modelled on the Khader (2015) dimensionless-correction approach already used for centrifugal compressors in CompressorChartKhader2015.
    ExpanderInterface
    ExpanderInterface interface.
    ExpanderOld
    ExpanderOld class.
    MapTurboExpanderCompressor
    MapTurboExpanderCompressor class.
    MapTurboExpanderCompressor.OperatingStatus
    Operating status returned after a MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode.BALANCED_SPEED solution.
    MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode
    Shaft solution mode for the turboexpander-compressor.
    RadialExpanderGeometryMap
    Geometry-based performance-map generator for a 90° radial-inflow (IFR) turbo-expander.
    TurboExpanderCompressor
    TurboExpanderCompressor models a coupled expander and compressor system with design and performance parameters, polynomial curve fits for efficiency and head, and Newton-Raphson iteration for speed matching.
    TurboExpanderCompressor.IGVModelResult
     
    TurboExpanderMapIngestion
    TurboExpanderMapIngestion is a utility (P4) for building auditable performance maps from digitised OEM data sheets (for example the Atlas Copco Rotoflow ACR00162 design and Case B curves).
    TurboExpanderMapIngestion.AnchorPoint
    AnchorPoint captures a single certified operating point used to validate an assembled map.
    TurboExpanderOperatingEnvelope
    TurboExpanderOperatingEnvelope (P6) generalises a single turndown line into a two-dimensional operating-envelope sweep over inlet pressure and feed flow rate.
